description: Massive provides financial market data covering stocks, options, futures, indices, forex, crypto, and related datasets. Its products include on-demand APIs, streaming feeds, bulk historical files, and AI-oriented access through MCP and LLM-friendly documentation.
summary: Massive exposes a REST API at api.massive.com, a WebSocket market-data API, an S3-compatible Flat Files endpoint at files.massive.com, a hosted MCP server at mcp.massive.com, and a self-hostable `mcp_massive` CLI/server; authentication is via Massive-issued API keys, S3 keys, or OAuth depending on surface.
